# Context management in StyleSwift extension (2026-03-10 14:22Z)

_**User**_

Thoroughly explore the StyleSwift Chrome extension codebase to understand how context management is implemented for the AI agent. I need to understand:

1. How the agent loop works (extension/sidepanel/agent-loop.js)
2. How sessions are managed (extension/sidepanel/session.js)
3. How context is collected from the page (extension/content/content.js)
4. How the sidepanel UI handles conversations (extension/sidepanel/panel.js)
5. The design document for context management (doc/StyleSwift设计方案.md - look for context-related sections)

For each file, identify:
- How context (page styles, user selections, conversation history) is collected, stored, and passed to the LLM
- Token/context window management strategies
- Any compression or summarization of context
- How conversation history is maintained across turns
- Message format sent to the LLM API

Return a detailed analysis of the current context management implementation, including specific code patterns, data structures, and any existing optimization mechanisms. Include line numbers for key sections.
